rules.title: Sensitive local path reference
rules.message: {asset} references a sensitive local path or credential store.
rules.remediation: Remove direct sensitive path access, scope to project directories, and broker credentials through policy-controlled secrets.

rules.title: Hardcoded secret-like value
rules.remediation: Revoke the exposed credential, remove it from the skill, and use scoped runtime credential injection.

rules.title: Hidden or adversarial instruction
rules.message: {asset} contains language commonly used for hidden instructions or prompt injection.
rules.remediation: Review the instruction source, remove hidden behavior, and require provenance for skill updates.

rules.title: Dangerous shell operation
rules.remediation: Remove the command or require explicit human approval and sandboxing before execution.

rules.title: Potential data exfiltration sink
rules.message: {asset} references a potential outbound data sink.
rules.remediation: Route outbound traffic through an approved proxy and enforce data-flow policy for sensitive sources.

rules.title: Unpinned self-update or remote fetch
rules.message: {asset} can fetch mutable remote code or dependencies.
rules.remediation: Pin versions and content hashes, or mirror reviewed artifacts internally.

rules.title: Docker socket or privileged container access
rules.message: {asset} references Docker socket or privileged container behavior.
rules.remediation: Deny by default unless the server runs in a controlled sandbox with explicit approval.
